09/30/2018
669 GG0170H3_RSDNT_WLK_END_CD GG0170H3_RSDNT_WLK_END_CD GG0170H3 Mobility: Does Resident Walk at End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident walks at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=No, and walking goal is not clinically indicated
 1=No, and walking goal is clinically indicated
 2=Yes
 ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2016
discontinued 09/30/2018
